It allows users to input personal and health-related details such as age, BMI, number of dependents, smoking habits, and region to estimate their insurance premium.

items.name: ml-provenance-defense
items.description: This project implements a robust provenance and defense framework for machine learning pipelines, designed to mitigate risks of ML supply chain poisoning. It provides tools to track, verify, and secure model lineage, ensuring transparency and trustworthiness across datasets, preprocessing steps, and training artifacts.

items.name: Customer-Churn-Prediction-with-Profit-Optimized-Machine-Learning-Business-Decision-Framework

The project goes beyond prediction by optimizing decision thresholds based on business profit, implementing customer segmentation, lift analysis, and explainable AI (SHAP) to support data-driven retention strategies.
